evals.name: israel-jobs-specific-company
evals.prompt: my brother yoad just graduated CS and is looking for his first dev job. can you check if fireblocks has any open positions? he's based in israel
evals.expected_output: A list of job openings at Fireblocks fetched from the Greenhouse API, with titles, locations, and apply URLs. Should highlight any junior/entry-level positions.
expectations: The skill fetches data from the Fireblocks Greenhouse API endpoint (boards-api.greenhouse.io)
Results include job titles and apply URLs
Results mention location information
Output is formatted in a readable list or table

evals.name: israel-jobs-general-search
evals.prompt: search for junior software developer jobs in Israel across all the Israeli job boards. yoad just graduated and has no preference on tech stack
evals.expected_output: Results from multiple Israeli job boards (AllJobs, Drushim, Indeed IL, etc.) in both Hebrew and English, with source attribution and fit scoring.
expectations: WebSearch is used to query at least 2 different Israeli job board sites
At least one Hebrew search query is executed (containing Hebrew characters)
Results include source attribution (which site each job came from)
Output includes job titles and URLs or directions to apply

evals.name: ashby-remote-scan
evals.prompt: scan ashby companies for remote software developer positions that yoad could apply to - he's a fresh CS grad looking to work remotely from israel
evals.expected_output: Remote-only job listings fetched from Ashby API endpoints, filtered for developer roles and excluding senior positions.
expectations: Multiple Ashby API endpoints are fetched (at least 3 companies)
Results only include remote positions (isRemote or workplaceType filtering mentioned)
Senior/staff/principal/director roles are excluded or deprioritized
Results include company name, job title, and apply URL for each listing

evals.name: job-search-il-default
evals.prompt: run a broad job search across Israeli sites for yoad. he's a recent CS graduate looking for any junior dev role in israel or remote. no specific tech stack preference
evals.expected_output: Aggregated results from multiple Israeli job boards using WebSearch, scored by fit, with new results saved to history.
expectations: WebSearch queries are run for multiple Israeli job sites
Both Hebrew and English search queries are used
Results are scored or categorized by fit (High/Medium/Low)
Output mentions saving to or checking ~/.yoad-jobs/job-history.md
Results include source attribution for each job listing

evals.name: job-search-il-keyword
evals.prompt: search Israeli job sites for 'Python developer' positions for yoad. he just finished his CS degree and is based in tel aviv
evals.expected_output: Targeted search results for Python developer roles from Israeli sites, using the provided keyword instead of defaults.
expectations: The keyword 'Python' appears in the search queries
WebSearch queries target Israeli job board sites
Results are relevant to Python development roles
Output includes fit scoring or relevance assessment
